tagline: Custom Vinyl & Gunite Pools Built for Your Backyard

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pools Built by Family Hands
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, B & B Pools has designed and built custom vinyl and gunite pools for families across Upstate South Carolina. Experience the difference of a family-owned company that treats your backyard like their own.
hero.cta_text: Get Your Free Pool Design Consultation

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs — Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to chemicals and maintenance, we handle every stage of pool ownership.

cards.title: Custom Vinyl Pools
cards.description: Flexible, budget-friendly pool designs with customizable shapes and sizes tailored to fit your backyard perfectly.

cards.title: Gunite Pool Construction
cards.description: Fully custom concrete pools with unlimited design freedom — built for premium durability and timeless beauty.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Complete pool makeovers including resurfacing, tile upgrades, coping replacement, and structural repairs.

cards.title: Maintenance & Repair
cards.description: Ongoing weekly service, equipment repair, seasonal openings and closings to keep your pool crystal clear.

cards.title: Pool Retail Showroom
cards.description: Visit our 12,000+ sq ft store for chemicals, equipment, accessories, and hands-on expert advice.

cards.title: Pool Equipment & Automation
cards.description: Installation and repair of pumps, heaters, salt systems, and smart automation for effortless pool control.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Free Consultation & Design
steps.description: Visit our showroom or schedule a home visit. We'll discuss your vision, assess your yard, and present custom design options.

steps.title: Construction by Our In-House Team
steps.description: Our experienced crew builds your pool from excavation to finish — no subcontractors, just quality craftsmanship you can trust.

steps.title: Enjoy & We'll Maintain It
steps.description: Dive into your new backyard oasis. We offer ongoing maintenance packages so you can relax while we handle the upkeep.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1986
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Building Excellence
about.description: Founded by Jerry Bowers in 1986, B & B Pools has grown from a small construction outfit into Upstate South Carolina's most trusted pool company. With a state-of-the-art retail showroom, an in-house construction team, and multiple industry awards, we still operate with the same family values we started with — honest communication, hands-on involvement, and pride in every pool we build.
about.badge: Pool & Hot Tub Alliance Gold Winner

features.title: Family-Owned & Operated 40+ Years
features.description: Three generations of pool building expertise with hands-on owner involvement in every project we take on.

features.title: Award-Winning Pool Designs
features.description: Recognized by the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance Carolinas Chapter with Gold-level awards for design excellence.

features.title: 12,000+ Sq Ft Retail Showroom
features.description: Visit our state-of-the-art showroom with display pools, equipment demos, and expert staff ready to help.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool project is unique. We provide detailed written proposals with clear pricing — no hidden fees, no change-order games. Financing options available to fit your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to You
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build. B & B Pools offers comprehensive warranties on construction and equipment, responsive after-sale service, and a 40-year reputation built on doing things right the first time. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's our family legacy.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most pool projects take 8-12 weeks from groundbreaking to completion, depending on design complexity, weather, and permitting. We'll give you a realistic timeline upfront and keep you updated throughout.

faqs.question: What's the difference between vinyl and gunite pools?
faqs.answer: Vinyl pools offer a cost-effective solution with flexible design options, while gunite (concrete) pools provide unlimited shape customization and premium durability. We'll help you choose the best fit for your budget and backyard.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool projects?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to help make your dream pool a reality. Ask us about current rates and terms during your free consultation.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg, and surrounding Upstate South Carolina communities — all within convenient reach of our Pelzer showroom.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom before committing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our 12,000+ sq ft showroom features display pools, equipment, and accessories. Walk-ins are welcome, or schedule a visit to get one-on-one attention from our team.

testimonials.name: Sonya B.
testimonials.text: From start to finish, the entire process was seamless. The communication was excellent and everything was coordinated perfectly.

testimonials.name: Kim S.
testimonials.text: The entire staff — from installers to ownership — was professional, responsive, and always available to answer questions.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Everyone at B & B communicates with each other and I was kept updated throughout the entire process. They made this huge project an easy process. I use the company also for pool maintenance — you still get high quality service after the sale.

contact.headline: Let's Build Your Backyard Paradise
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free consultation or visit our showroom — we'd love to show you what's possible.
benefits: Visit our 12,000+ sq ft showroom anytime

footer.description: B & B Pools has been Upstate South Carolina's trusted pool builder since 1986. From custom construction to maintenance and retail, we're your one-stop pool company.
footer.service_area: Serving Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg, and surrounding Upstate South Carolina communities.
